S

SAFDeletedCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
For DELETESAFFILE command, it stand for Total number of records deleted.
SAFFailedCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Number of failed records during the uploading process
SAFFailedTotal - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Number of total records in failed Database after the uploading process.
SAFIndicator - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchRequest
Store and forward upload type indicator
SAFIndicator - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportRequest
Store and forward transaction report indicator.
SAFMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Store and forward mode indicator.
SAFMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Store and forward mode indicator
SAFTotalAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Total amount for all the new SAF records (exclude old records.
SAFTotalCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
For SAFUPLOAD command, it stand for Total number of new SAF records (exclude old records).
SAFUploadedAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Amount of successful approved uploaded records.
SAFUploadedCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Number of successful approved uploaded records.
SAFUploadMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
SAF Uploading mode.

The decode result.

Return the first block of a given sector.

e-Commerce secure type.
Security - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
Security:
Security - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService
Security:
SECURITY_INPUT_FORMAT_ERROR - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
It will be fired when "STATE_INPUT_FORMAT_ERROR" occurred Only take effect when the server presses confirm
SECURITY_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_ERROR - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
It will be fired when "STATE_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_ERROR" occurred Only take effect when InputAccount.handleInputCardNum(String, InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback) is called
SECURITY_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_OK - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
It will be fired when "STATE_INPUT_LUHN_CHECK_OK" occurred Only take effect when InputAccount.handleInputCardNum(String, InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback) is called

Send data
send(byte[]) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkSerialPort

Send the input area to BroadPOS, and display the input area by BroadPOS.

Send the input area to BroadPOS, and display the input area by BroadPOS.

Send the input area to BroadPOS, and display the input area by BroadPOS.

setCustomData(List<String>) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Custom data string to be encrypted, Used to define any special formats for sensitive data (PAN, Track2, etc).

Request the Custom MAC Information.

Data to be encrypted.

setEnableHardKey(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.formManage.ShowTextBoxRequest
See ManageRequest.EnableHardKey
setEnableProxy(boolean) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.CommSetting
Proxy is a feature used on POS machine without connection ability, such as Q20 on E500.
setEncryptionFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Data Encryption flag.
setEncryptionType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
The value is as below:
1: DUKPT.(DES DUKPT)
2: Master Session DES
3: AES DUKPT

EndTap

Flag indicates whether expiry date needs to be prompted during manual entry.
setFallbackInsertEntryFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Whether fallback insert is allowed after reading contactless card failed.
setFallbackSwipeEntryFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Whether fallback swipe is allowed after reading EMV card failed.
setFallbackToManualEntryFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Whether fallback to manual is allowed after reading swipe card failed.

setIssuerAuthenticationData(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.CompleteOnlineEMV.CompleteOnlineEMVRequest
If issuer authentication data (tag 91) is returned by host, it shall be * set to terminal.
setIssuerScript1(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.CompleteOnlineEMV.CompleteOnlineEMVRequest
If issuer script (tag 71) is returned by host, it shall be set to terminal.
setIssuerScript2(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.CompleteOnlineEMV.CompleteOnlineEMVRequest
If issuer script (tag 72) is returned by host, it shall be set to terminal.

setKeyFileMapping(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasSetMerchantParameters.ApplePayVAS
Enter the key file names in the same order so that it corresponds with the Merchant IDs being set in VAS Data.
setKeySlot(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
This field is effective only when ONLINE PIN is required.
setKeySlot(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
Key slot number, start from 1.
setKeySlot(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.CustomMACInformation
Key slot for encryption.
setKeySLot(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Slot index of the key used to calculate PINBLOCK.
setKeyType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.CustomMACInformation
The type of the key which is used to calculate MAC value
setKSN(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountResponse.CustomMACInfo
KSN for MAC (returned when DUKPT key was used)
setKsnFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
Indicate whether to increase KSN, when MAC key type is 1(DUKPT Key)
setKsnFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
Indicate whether to increase KSN, when MAC key type is 1(DUKPT Key)
setKsnFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Indicate whether to increase KSN, when MAC key type is 1(DUKPT Key)

Set Bluetooth printer Mac address.
setMagneticSwipeEntryFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Flag indicates whether magnetic card swipe is allowed.
setManualEntryFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Flag indicates whether manual entry is allowed.
setMaxAccountLength(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
MAX length for account.
setMaxAccountLength(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
MAX length for account.
setMaxLength(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.formManage.ShowTextBoxRequest
SeeManageRequest.MAXLength
setMcc(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setMerchantCategory(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasSetMerchantParameters.GoogleSmartTap
Digit merchant code referring to the category of the merchant as defined by the networks.
setMerchantCategoryCode(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.TerminalConfiguration
A Merchant Category Code (MCC) is a four-digit number listed in ISO 18245 for retail financial services.
setMerchantDecision(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
0: default (no merchant decision)
1: force online
2: force decline
3: force acceptance
setMerchantId(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasSetMerchantParameters.ApplePayVAS
Max 5 merchant ID’s connect by '#'.
setMerchantName(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasSetMerchantParameters.GoogleSmartTap
Merchant name.
setMessage(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.broadpos.ReceiverResult
 
setMessage1(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.RemoveCard.RemoveCardRequest
The first line of message displayed on screen.
setMessage2(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.RemoveCard.RemoveCardRequest
The second line of message displayed on screen.
setMinAccountLength(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
MIN length for account.
setMinAccountLength(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
MIN length for account.
setMinLength(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.formManage.ShowTextBoxRequest
SeeManageRequest.MINLength
setMmsc(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setMmsport(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setMmsproxy(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setMnc(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setMobileDataEnable(Context, boolean) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings
Enable or disable the mobile data network
setMvno_type(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setMvnoMatchData(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setName(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setNavigationBarEnable(Context, boolean) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings
Enable/Disable the navigation bar of Android System
setNavigationBarVisible(Context, boolean) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings
Visible/Invisible the navigation bar of Android System
setNetworkPrefixLength(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.WifiParam
 
setNewServices(List<VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService.NewService>) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService
The List of VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService.NewService
setNumeric(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setOffsetX(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.PedManager.PedKeyInfo
 
setOffsetY(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.PedManager.PedKeyInfo
 
setOnlineAuthorizationResult(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.CompleteOnlineEMV.CompleteOnlineEMVRequest
0: transaction approved online
1: transaction declined online
2: connect host failed
3: request partial EMV
setOseToPpse(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasSetMerchantParameters.GoogleSmartTap
OSE TO PPSE
setOutputPath(String) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.LogSetting
Set the log output path
setPaddingChar(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
This is used to indicate what value need to pad on data string before encryption.
setParityCheck(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.SerialPortParameters
One of the value in SerialPortParameters.ParityCheck.
setPassword(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setPassword(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.tech.MifareClassic.RemoteParam
Password to authority
setPasswordType(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.tech.MifareClassic.RemoteParam
Password type:
0: password A type
1: password B type
setPedKeyBoardLayout(boolean, Map<PedManager.KeyCode, View>) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.PedManager
Set the custom Pin input keyboard layout,This method is called before,need to ensure that the incoming View has been mapped, such as Activity.onWindowFocusChanged (Boolean hasFocus),when hasFocus equals true, this method is called.
setPedKeyBoardLayout(boolean, List<PedManager.PedKeyInfo>) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.PedManager
Set the custom Pin input keyboard layout.
setPhysicalKeyEnable(Context, boolean) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings
Enable or disable physical keyboard if device has.
setPinAlgorithm(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
When the Encryption Type is 1(DES DUKPT) or 2(Master Session DES):
The value is as below, default to 0:
0: ISO9564_0
1: ISO9564_1
3: ISO9564_3
When the Encryption Type is 3(AES DUKPT):
The value is as below, default to 4:
4: ISO9564_4
setPinAlgorithm(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
When the Encryption Type is 1(DES DUKPT) or 2(Master Session DES):
The value is as below, default to 0:
0: ISO9564_0
1: ISO9564_1
3: ISO9564_3
When the Encryption Type is 3(AES DUKPT):
The value is as below, default to 4:
4: ISO9564_4
setPinBypassFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
This field is effective only when PIN is required.
setPinBypassFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
Default as 0.
setPinEncryptionType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
This field is effective only when ONLINE PIN is required.
setPinMaxLength(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
This field is effective only when PIN is required.
setPinMaxLength(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
The value must be not less pin min length, and must be not more than 12.
setPinMinLength(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
This field is effective only when PIN is required.
setPinMinLength(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
The value must be not less 4, and must be not more than pin max length.
setPinpadType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
0: Internal Pinpad.(default)
1: External Pinpad (A80 only, if use other device will return param error).
2: RNIB Pinpad mode.
3: External Pinpad first.
setPinpadType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
0: Internal Pinpad.(default)
1: External Pinpad (A80 only, if use other device will return param error).
2: RNIB Pinpad mode.
3: External Pinpad first.
setPinpadType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.RemoveCard.RemoveCardRequest
0: Internal Pinpad.(default)
1: External Pinpad (A80 only, if use other device will return param error).
2: RNIB Pinpad mode.
3: External Pinpad first.
setPort(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setPowerKeyEnable(Context, boolean) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings
Enable/Disable the power key of Android System
setPrintWidth(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkPrinter
The width of the bitmap when using POSLinkPrinter.print(String, int, CommSetting, PrintListener, boolean...).
setProcessTransResult(ProcessTransResult) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.base.BaseResponse
 
setProtocol(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setProxy(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setRearCameraFlag(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Not supported for now.
setReceiverListener(BroadPOSReceiverHelper.ReceiverListener) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.broadpos.BroadPOSReceiverHelper
Start listening to the information transmitted by BroadPOS.
If the listener is null, it means turning off the listener.
setRecentKeyEnable(Context, boolean) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings
Enable/Disable the recent key of Android System
setReconnect(boolean) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.WifiParam
 
setRemoteParam(MifareClassic.RemoteParam) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.tech.MifareClassic
Set up RemoteParam.
setReportStatus(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Whether to report status back.
setReportStatusListener(AbstractPosLink.ReportStatusListener) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
Register a callback to be invoked when terminal reported integer status.
setReportStatusListener(InputAccount.ReportStatusListener) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount
Register a callback to be invoked when terminal reported integer status.
setRequestVar(String, String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.WebService
Set the request field for request message
setResponseCode(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.CompleteOnlineEMV.CompleteOnlineEMVRequest
 
setRoamingProtocol(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setScannerSettings(Map<String, String>) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkScanner
Only supported if the ScannerType is POSLinkScanner.ScannerType.LASER
setScannerSettings(Map<String, String>) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkScannerHw
Set the configuration of ScannerHw
setScanResultMode(Context, int) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkScanner
Set the shortcut key to scan the result processing mode.
setScreenOffTime(Context, MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings
Set the screen off time.
setScreenSaver(Context, String, String) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings

setScreenSaverActivateType(Context, int) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings
Set the screen saver activation type.

Security
setSecurity(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasSetMerchantParameters.GoogleSmartTap
Security
setSerialParam(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.ModemParameters
Default is ModemParameters.SerialParam.PARAM_8_NONE_1.
setSerialPort(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.CommSetting
Set serial port
setServer(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
 
setServiceType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasSetMerchantParameters.GoogleSmartTap
Please refer to Google Service Type Bitmap Definition
Default value is “1000000000000000”

Default is 1.

Default tag list:

EMV tag list to be returned in EMV TLV data in response message.
setTagList(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.EMVTLVData.GetTLVRequest
List of tags which have been set successfully.
setTagList(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Tag list to be requested in the response message.
setTargetDevice(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.UpdateResource.UpdateResourceRequest
Used to update the firmware of the specified device.

See ManageRequest.TaxLine

The telephone number.

setTimeOut(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.CommSetting
Set communication timeout.
setTimeOut(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.customFormManage.RunFormRequest
Timeout in 100ms, valid value should be [0, 9999]
setTimeOut(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.formManage.DoSignatureRequest
See ManageRequest.TimeOut
setTimeOut(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.formManage.ShowDialogFormRequest
See ManageRequest.TimeOut
setTimeOut(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.formManage.ShowDialogRequest
See ManageRequest.TimeOut
setTimeOut(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.formManage.ShowTextBoxRequest
See ManageRequest.TimeOut
setTimeOut(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
Should be [0, 3000]
setTimeOut(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Timeout Should be [200, 9999].
setTimeOut(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Timeout Should be [200, 9999].
setTimeout(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.UpdateResource.UpdateResourceRequest
Valid value should be [200, 9999].
setTimeout(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.tech.MifareClassic.RemoteParam
Timeout for remote card reading.
setTimeOut100ms(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
Should be [0, 3000]

See ManageRequest.Title

The title that to be displayed, default as “Amount: $0.00”.
setTitle(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService.NewService
Title of the new service
setTitle(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService.ServiceUsage
A short description of valuables.
SettlementDate - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.TransInfo
Transaction settlement date, the format is YYYYMMDD.
SettlementDate - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.Original
Original transaction settlement date, the format is YYYYMMDD.

00 for EMV contact.
setTLVType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.EMVTLVData.SetTLVRequest
00 for EMV contact.

See ManageRequest.TopDown
setTopDown(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.formManage.ShowMessageRequest
See ManageRequest.TopDown
setTotalLine(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.formManage.ShowItemRequest
See ManageRequest.TotalLine
setTotalLine(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.formManage.ShowMessageRequest
See ManageRequest.TotalLine
setTrackDataSentinel(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
This is used to indicate the response track 1 and track 2 data whether need to include start and end sentinels for magnetic swipe transaction.
setTransactionCVMLimit(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.TerminalConfiguration
Configure the limit value of CVM for current transaction.
setTransactionDate(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.TerminalConfiguration
9A: Transaction Date Format is YYMMDD.
setTransactionSequenceNumber(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.TerminalConfiguration
9F41: Transaction Sequence Number.
setTransactionTime(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.TerminalConfiguration
9F21: Transaction Time format is HHMMSS.
setTransType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
See TransType
setTransType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
See TransType
setType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.CommSetting
Set type
setType(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo

Set the typeface of the printed text.
setTypeFace(Typeface) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkPrinter
Set the typeface of the printed text.

This is a wrapper to use PosLink to do communication with ManageRequest.TransType = 3, SETVAR.

The name of the variable.
See Configurable Parameter Definition for definition.
setVariableName(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.Variable.SetVariableRequest
The name of the variable.
See Configurable Parameter Definition for definition.

The name of the variable 1.
setVariableName1(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.Variable.SetVariableRequest

Set a list of variables.
setVarList(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.customFormManage.SetVarListRequest
It uses JSON format:{"VARNAME1":"VARVALUE1","VARNAME2":"VARVALUE2"}
SetVarListRequest - Class in com.pax.poslink.customFormManage
 
SetVarListRequest() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.customFormManage.SetVarListRequest

The set var response for custom form management.
SetVarListResponse() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.customFormManage.SetVarListResponse
 
setVarNameList(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.customFormManage.GetVarListRequest
It uses comma to separate each field Format: varName1,varName2,...

VAS Mode

setWifiHotspotSettingsEnable(Context, boolean) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings
Enable/Disable the wifi hotspot Setting of Android System
setWifiStaticIp(Context, WifiParam) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings
Set static ip address(wifi network must be connected)
setWorkMode(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.CustomMACInformation
MAC calculation mode
setZipPrompt(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
Whether Zip code need to prompted during manual entry
ShiftID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Shift id number.
ShipFromZipCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
The ship from zip code.
ShippingCompany - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
The shipping company name or ID.
ShippingTrackingNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
The shipment’s tracking number.
ShowDialog - Class in com.pax.poslink.formManage

start(POSLinkScanner.ScannerListener) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkScanner
Deprecated.
use POSLinkScanner.start(IScanListener) instead, this method can only return scanned content without format

Jump to scan Activity. You should POSLinkScanner.open() first.
